subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Great Name! Blessed are they whose eyes are illumined by beholding the lights of grace from the Most High Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده اسم اعظم خوشا بحال نفوسی که چشم را بمشاهده انوار فیض رب اعلی روشن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @primordial Covenant; the day of alast, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
